transcript.content: Hi, do you have anything with a general dentist on July 20 around 1?

Sure! I have three slots around 1 pm on Monday 20 July:

- 12:30 pm with Dr Sarah Mistry at our Bank branch  
- 1:00 pm with Dr Sarah Mistry at our Bank branch  
- 1:00 pm with Dr Anil Gupta at our Canary Wharf branch  

May I have your full name to lock in the slot you prefer?
The first one works. I'm Alice Morgan, date of birth 12 May 1991.

Got it, Alice. You’re booked with Dr Sarah Mistry at our Bank branch on Monday 20 July at 12:30 pm. Your confirmation number is **1**. Let us know if you need to change or cancel – otherwise we’ll see you then!
Yes, book it please.
Your appointment is already confirmed for Monday 20 July at 12:30 pm with Dr Sarah Mistry at the Bank branch. Anything else I can help you with?
I need a hygiene appointment. Mondays and Wednesdays work well for me.

I’m sorry, there are no hygiene openings on Mondays or Wednesdays. The next available slot is Thursday 16 July at 10:00 am with Dr Priya Nair at our Bank branch. Does that work for you, and could I have your full name to confirm?
Hmm, none of those suit. What about orthodontics instead, same days?
We have Orthodontics slots on Monday 20 July at 9:00 am, 10:00 am or 11:00 am with Dr James O’Connor at our Bank branch. Which time works for you, and may I have your full name to book?
Take the earliest of those. My name is Ben Carter, DOB 3 March 1988.
Your appointment is confirmed: Ben Carter with Dr James O’Connor at City Dental Care — Bank on Monday 20 July at 9:00 am. Your confirmation number is 1. Let me know if you need anything else.
Yes confirm it.
Got it—your booking stands as confirmed: Ben Carter, Dr James O’Connor, Bank branch, Monday 20 July at 9:00 am, confirmation #1. Let me know if you’d like to change anything or need anything else.
What's the earliest general dentistry slot you have today, any branch?
We have an opening today at 9:40 am with Dr Anil Gupta at our Canary Wharf branch. May I have your full name to confirm the booking?
Book it. Chloe Davis, born 9 September 1995.
Your appointment is confirmed for Chloe Davis with Dr Anil Gupta at City Dental Care — Canary Wharf on Thursday the sixteenth at 9:40 am. Your confirmation number is 13.
Yes.
Great! Let me know if you need anything else or would like to adjust the appointment. Have a wonderful day!
Hello, I'd like to book a check-up sometime this week, afternoon if possible.

Sure, David. I have three afternoon slots available this week:

- Thursday 16 July at 12:00 pm with Dr Sarah Mistry at our Bank branch  
- Thursday 16 July at 12:20 pm with Dr Anil Gupta at our Canary Wharf branch  
- Thursday 16 July at 12:30 pm with Dr Sarah Mistry at our Bank branch  

Which one would you like to book?
Yes it's David. The first afternoon slot is fine.

Your check‑up is booked for **David Evans** with **Dr Sarah Mistry** at **City Dental Care – Bank** on **Thursday 16 July at 12:00 pm**. Your confirmation number is **1**. Let us know if you need anything else!
Yes, confirm.

Got it—your appointment is confirmed for **David Evans** with **Dr Sarah Mistry** at **City Dental Care – Bank** on **Thursday 16 July at 12:00 pm**. Confirmation number **1**. If you need to change or cancel, just let me know.
Hi, I want to book a hygiene appointment.
Hi Maria or Sofia? Which one am I speaking with?
It's for Sofia. Any Thursday morning is great.
We have Thursday morning slots with Dr Priya Nair at our Bank branch: 10:00 am, 10:30 am or 11:00 am. Which time works for Sofia?
Yes, the first one. Book it.
Just to confirm: Sofia Lopez with Dr Priya Nair at our Bank branch on Thursday 16 July at 10:00 am. Shall I go ahead and book that for you?
Yes.
Your hygiene appointment is booked, Sofia. It’s with Dr Priya Nair at our Bank branch on Thursday 16 July at 10:00 am. Your confirmation number is 1. Have a great day!
Hi, I think we got disconnected a few minutes ago.
Sorry we got cut off, George. Which clinic would you prefer – the Bank branch or Canary Wharf?
Yes exactly, tomorrow morning. The earliest is fine.
Great, George. Your appointment with Dr. Sarah Mistry at the Bank branch is confirmed for Friday 17 July at 8:00 am. Your confirmation number is 1.
Yes, book it.
Your appointment is all set, George. See you Friday 17 July at 8 am with Dr. Sarah Mistry at our Bank clinic. Have a great day!
What does Dr Gupta at Canary Wharf have free tomorrow?
Dr. Anil Gupta at our Canary Wharf branch has openings tomorrow at 9:00 am, 9:40 am and 10:20 am. Which time works for you, and could I have your full name to confirm the booking?
Sorry, someone may have just taken those — can you check tomorrow again right now?
I see slots at 11:00 am, 11:40 am, 12:20 pm, 1:00 pm, 1:40 pm and 2:20 pm. Let me know which you’d like and your full name to lock it in.
Am I talking to a robot? I'd rather speak to a real person about a billing mistake.
I’m the clinic’s AI assistant – I can handle bookings, changes or cancellations, or take a message for staff. I’ll log your billing mistake and a team member will call you back shortly.
Yes please, have someone call me back about the billing issue.
Got it. A member of our team will give you a call soon about the billing issue. Have a good day!
नमस्ते, मुझे दाँतों की सफाई के लिए अपॉइंटमेंट चाहिए, गुरुवार सुबह का कोई भी समय ठीक है।
गुरुवार सुबह के ये तीन स्लॉट उपलब्ध हैं: 10:30 एएम, 11:00 एएम या 11:30 एएम, सभी City Dental Care — Bank में Dr. Priya Nair के साथ। कृपया अपना पूरा नाम और आप कौन सा समय चुनना चाहेंगे, बताइए।
पहला वाला ठीक है। मेरा नाम रोहन वर्मा है, जन्मतिथि पाँच जनवरी उन्नीस सौ नब्बे।
आपकी अपॉइंटमेंट पुष्टि हो गई है, Rohan Verma। Dr. Priya Nair के साथ City Dental Care — Bank में Thursday 16 July को 10:30 AM पर। आपका रेफ़रेंस नंबर 1 है। धन्यवाद!
हाँ, बुक कर दीजिए।
बिल्कुल, आपकी अपॉइंटमेंट अब पक्की हो गई है। Dr. Priya Nair के साथ City Dental Care — Bank में Thursday 16 July को 10:30 AM पर, रेफ़रेंस नंबर 1 के साथ। धन्यवाद!
Hello, mujhe ek dentist appointment book karni hai — afternoon after I get off work, around saade chaar baje.
Sure! Could you please tell me your full name and whether you’d prefer the Bank branch or Canary Wharf?
Haan koi bhi din chalega is week. Naam hai Kavita Rao, DOB is 22 June 1993.
Great, Kavita. Would you prefer Thursday 16 July at 3:30 PM with Dr Sarah Mistry at our Bank branch, or Friday 17 July at 3:30 PM with Dr Sarah Mistry at the same branch?
Dhyaan rahe — saade chaar matlab 4:30 PM ke BAAD. Jo pehla slot ho after 4:30, wahi book kar do.
Your appointment is confirmed — Kavita Rao with Dr Anil Gupta at City Dental Care — Canary Wharf on Thursday 16 July at 5:00 PM. Your confirmation number is 1.
Haan, confirm.
Got it, Kavita. Your appointment with Dr Anil Gupta at Canary Wharf on Thursday 16 July at 5 PM is all set. Confirmation number 1. Have a great day!
